etymology.description: ๐ฆซ (phonetic) + ไธฎ (semantic) -> corrupted into ไบซ (phonetic) + ไธธ (semantic) -> ๅญฐ
etymology.interpretation: The character ๅญฐ originally combined the phonetic component ๐ฆซ with the semantic component ไธฎ. Over time, these components transformed into ไบซ and ไธธ respectively, leading to the current character form. This composition represents the character's meaning related to something processed or ripe.
